mapper.select: /* wms-report-ibObInvnStatus-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbObInvnStatusList */ SELECT A.* FROM ( ) A

/* wms-report-ibObInvnStatus-sql-oracle.xml - selectWcsStorageReq */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , REQUEST_DATE , ICS_SEQ , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WCSSTORAGE_REQ WHERE 1 = 1 AND REQUEST_DATE = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD')
